service.name: arXiv API
service.description_for_ai: Free access to 2M+ preprint research papers in physics, mathematics, computer science, AI, biology, economics. No API key needed. Real-time preprints before peer review. Best source for latest AI research.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Free access to 2M+ preprint research papers in physics, mathematics, computer science, AI, biology, economics. No API key needed. Real-time preprints before peer review. Best source for latest AI research. Search arXiv preprints by keyword, author, title, abstract. Best for latest AI/ML/CS research papers.

search_query.description: Search query with field prefixes: all:keyword, ti:title, au:author, abs:abstract, cat:cs.AI

agent_hints.categories: cs.AI=AI, cs.LG=Machine Learning, cs.CL=NLP, cs.CV=Computer Vision, cs.RO=Robotics, quant-ph=Quantum Physics, math=Mathematics
agent_hints.response_format: Returns Atom XML. Parse entry elements for papers.
